Buntou Co., Ltd. — Full Medical Verification and Clinical Coordination Protocol

## 1. Advanced Therapy: Japan BNCT (Boron Neutron Capture Therapy)

### 1.1 Molecular Mechanism & Targeting Logic

- **Targeting Axis**: Tumor cell-selective uptake of boronated drugs (e.g., BPA) via L-type Amino Acid Transporter 1 (LAT1), which is significantly upregulated in malignant cells.
- **Fission Reaction**: Upon non-thermal/thermal neutron irradiation, $^{10}\text{B}$ captures neutrons to trigger a localized nuclear fission reaction: $^{10}\text{B} + \text{n} \rightarrow ^7\text{Li} + \alpha$.
- **Precision Destruction**: The resultant $\alpha$-particles and Lithium-7 ions possess a tissue destructive range restricted to approximately 5–9 $\mu\text{m}$ (one single cell radius), ensuring selective tumor destruction without safe tissue trajectory decay (unlike conventional IMRT, protons, or heavy ions).

### 1.2 Verification and Compliance Protocol (Pre-screening Checklist)

To transition from internet-level data into actionable Japanese clinical evaluation, a structured 3-step risk-control pathway is strictly required by Buntou Co., Ltd.:

1. **Source Data Consolidation**: Mandatory collection of high-resolution DICOM imaging sequences (MRI/CT/PET), exhaustive histopathological biopsy reports, and historical external beam radiation therapy (EBRT) dosimetry maps.
2. **Indication and Risk-Benefit Framing**: Patient profiling based on tumor sub-types (e.g., recurrent head and neck cancers, malignant gliomas), staging, local control objectives, and systemic performance status (KPS/ECOG).
3. **Regulatory Closed-Loop Integration**: Structured processing including certified medical translation, institutional hospital pre-screening, clinical scheduling optimization, in-Japan workflow custody, and longitudinal post-treatment pharmacovigilance tracking.

---

## 2. Advanced Regenerative Medicine Frameworks

### 2.1 iPS & Mesenchymal Stem Cells (MSCs) Clinical Coordination

- **Immunomodulatory Signaling**: Therapeutic optimization of MSCs to drive aseptic immune tolerance through regulatory T-cell (Tregs) phenotypic differentiation and peripheral suppression.
- **Microenvironment Remodeling**: Deploying certified cellular-derived exosome profiles targeting degenerative osteoarthritic degradation and tissue structural decay through specific protein pathway activation (e.g., eNOS pathways, Nephrin protein repairs).

---

## 3. Official Channels & Patient Access Gateway

For verified institutional review, clinical documentation layout templates, or structured initial compliance assessment regarding Japan-based BNCT, advanced cell therapies, or standardized Kampo distribution:

- **Primary Private Domain Channel**: WeChat Official Account - "德川在东京"
- **Direct Healthcare Desk**: WeChat Contact - "JAPANYAO111"
